data.body: STACK COMMIT 7 (#8 code_review artifact + data-capture limestone-unethical-zebrafinch): cb4609b. New code_review ticket TYPE mirroring session_log at EVERY guard site (schema enum+types.py regen, composer._TYPES, reducer _NON_GRAPH_ARTIFACT_TYPES set broadening exclude_session_logs predicate [callers inherit], _hierarchy tier0+blocking-refusal EXPLICIT, gates check_ac/clarity/quality exempt, _commands/gates.py plan-review claim-gate exempt, txn transition+claim refusal, transition_close skip, EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES, reads list-visibility, export_ndjson exclusion). sidecar.change_fingerprint (diff-scoped material_fingerprint analogue) + norm_id reuse + build_payload/emit EXTENDED w/ change_id/revision/change_fp. adapter threads full verdict up. voter.emit_code_review_artifact (create idempotent-per-(change,revision) + sidecar.emit + trailer-resolve->relates_to, best-effort). Infra: REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=always + REBAR_TRACKER_DIR=persistent-worktree + URL-scoped cred helper entrypoint + reviewbot-tickets-pat SSM/fetch-secrets; on-box push=deploy canary. test_code_review_artifact.py(14). Plan-review took 8 rounds (13->0 blocks; all plan-precision vs uncommitted-code grounding, impl always green). PASS+signed verified_at_sha=66956c0(tip). Claimed REBAR_GATE_REF=tip. lint+mypy clean, 1439 store-layer + 46 lifecycle + 14 artifact tests green. 7/8 committed. STACK TIP now cb4609b -> REBAR_GATE_REF for #3. Closes DEFERRED to Gerrit Verified.
